acceptanceSignals: Tracing, metrics, and logs are correlated via OpenTelemetry across services.
Hard-SLO dashboards and alert rules are published for release gating and can be extended per domain.
Kubernetes manifests include readiness/liveness and scaling signals tied to load.

attempts.latestEventSummary: feature completed: Observability and Kubernetes SLO Baseline in 0 attempts

lastCommit.message: feat: implement Observability and Kubernetes SLO Baseline (attempt 6)

reinforcementResults.name: HTTP Contract Sync Gate
reinforcementResults.summary: The workspace satisfies the active policy for this feature: observability/SLO baseline artifacts and gates are present, and no new formal externally used HTTP contract surface was introduced without synchronized OpenAPI/generated artifacts. CI still enforces route-to-spec parity and contract artifact drift checks.

reinforcementResults.name: No Legacy Path Rule
reinforcementResults.summary: The current workspace satisfies this feature’s active policy: OpenTelemetry correlation is hard-enforced across HTTP/MCP/compliance paths, VictoriaMetrics/VictoriaLogs/VictoriaTraces + Grafana hard-SLO artifacts are published and CI-gated, Kubernetes manifests include readiness/liveness/startup probes plus load-tied HPA signals, prelaunch load-test thresholds are policy-driven, and superseded fallback/legacy paths for this scope are explicitly removed/blocked.

excludedApproaches: Operating without hard SLO definitions before production.
Relying on unstructured logs without correlation context.
Shipping without production alert thresholds for peak periods.
executionConstraints: Instrument services with OpenTelemetry to VictoriaMetrics/VictoriaLogs/VictoriaTraces and Grafana.
Define and publish hard SLO dashboards used by release gates.
Set pre-launch load-test acceptance thresholds required by hard SLO policy.
name: Observability and Kubernetes SLO Baseline
rationale: High-scale reliability and release safety depend on measurable runtime signals.
summary: Establish reusable observability and SLO-governed deployment controls before peak-risk flows ship.
